zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark於1140年出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德時，她的父親Knud Magnussen12歲，母親Princess Helen of Sweden11歲。她和Prince Jaromar I of Rügen至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1229年在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫可萊斯 諾爾德維斯特米可倫波格多福 梅可倫波格梅可倫波格享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark于1140年出生在丹麦洛斯吉爾德时，她的父亲Knud Magnussen12岁，母亲Princess Helen of Sweden11岁。她和Prince Jaromar I of Rügen至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1229年在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫可萊斯 諾爾德維斯特米可倫波格多福 梅可倫波格梅可倫波格享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: af
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from ay ‘Moon’, by extension also ‘beautiful face’.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 艾, see   Ai   2.

variants.name: Ai
meanings: Japanese: usually written 阿井 with characters used phonetically. The meaning could be ‘meeting’. In North America, it may also be a shortened form of some other name.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 艾, referring to ‘Chinese mugwort’, a type of plant used in traditional Chinese medical treatment: (i) perhaps from the second element of Ru Ai (汝艾), the name of an official who lived during the reign of Shao Kang, the 6th king of the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ai Ling (艾陵), the name of a hill (located in Shandong province), the fief of Ai Kong (艾孔), an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) from the placename Ai (艾), the name of a fief (located in Jiangxi province) which was granted to an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) adopted as a surname by the Qu Jin (去斤), Qu Ai (去艾), and Ai Jin (艾斤) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (v) from Ai (艾), the name of an ancient state (possibly in present-day Jiangxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 愛, meaning ‘love’ in Chinese: (i) said to be traced back to Ai Xie Wu (愛邪勿), prime minister of the state of Huihu (known as Uyghur Empire or Uyghur Khaganate), who was endowed with the surname Ai (愛) by Emperor Wuzong of Tang (814–846  AD ). (ii) a Han Chinese surname for some members of the Aisin Gioro family from the Manchu ethnic group, known as the royal family of the Qing dynasty (1616 – 1911  AD ). (iii) a surname from minority ethnic groups in Taiwan.

nameMeanings.name: Danmark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

variants.name: Dence
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Herta.

English (Kent): variant of Dench, an ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle English denshe, dench ‘Danish’ (Old English denisc). There were many Danes in England in the Middle Ages, not only the long-established settlers in the Danelaw region, but also more recent immigrants.

nameMeanings.name: Hildegard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Germanic female personal name composed of hild ‘battle’ + gard ‘enclosure’. It was borne by the second wife of Charlemagne and by the mystical writer Hildegard of Bingen ( 1098–1179 ), in whose music and writings there has been great interest in recent decades.

variants.name: Hildegarde
meanings: From an old Germanic female personal name composed of hild ‘battle’ + gard ‘enclosure’. It was borne by the second wife of Charlemagne and by the mystical writer Hildegard of Bingen ( 1098–1179 ), in whose music and writings there has been great interest in recent decades.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark was born in 1140, in Roskilde, Denmark, her father, Knud Magnussen, was 12 and her mother, Princess Helen of Sweden, was 11. She had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Prince Jaromar I of Rügen. She died about 1229, in Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, at the age of 90.

Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Prince Jaromar I of Rügen. it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark è nata il nel 1140 nel Roskilde, Danimarca, sua padre, Knud Magnussen, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Princess Helen of Sweden, aveva 11 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Prince Jaromar I of Rügen. Morì circa 1229, nel Mecklenburg, Dorf Mecklenburg, Kreis Nordwestmecklenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, all'età di 90 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark(이)가 1140년 덴마크 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Knud Magnussen(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Helen of Sweden(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 Prince Jaromar I of Rügen(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1229년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 크레이스 노르드w스트클렌버그 도르프 클렌버그 클렌버그에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Prince Jaromar I of Rügen. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark родилась в 1140 г. в местности роскаилд, Дания, её отцу по имени Knud Magnussen было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Helen of Sweden, 11. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Prince Jaromar I of Rügen. Она умерла около 1229 г. в местности меккленбург, дорф меккленбург, крис нордвестмеккленбург, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия в возрасте 90 лет.
